hydraulics.spec_text: Inspect hoses for abrasion, swelling, leaks at fittings. Active drips = RED. Minor seeping = YELLOW. Service interval: 4000h or 5 years.

undercarriage.spec_text: Track tension sag: 30-40mm at measurement point. Master link cotter pins must be present. Sprocket teeth: replace at 50% wear.

cooling.spec_text: Coolant between MIN/MAX with engine cold. Milky = coolant/oil mix = RED. Continuous unexplained daily loss = RED.

steps_handrails.spec_text: Bent/broken steps = RED (fall hazard). Cracked glass = RED (visibility). Missing grip surface = YELLOW.

tires_rims.spec_text: Flat/damaged tires = RED. Cracked rim = RED. Missing lug nuts = RED. Cords visible = RED. Note: N/A for tracked excavators.

structural.spec_text: Any structural crack = RED. Surface rust = YELLOW. Pitting affecting structural integrity = RED.

boom_arm.spec_text: Inspect boom and stick for visible cracks, cylinder rod condition, pin wear. Bent or cracked boom = RED. Minor pin wear = YELLOW.

stick.spec_text: Inspect stick for cracks, deformation, cylinder leaks. Stick crack = RED. Cylinder weep = YELLOW.

bucket.spec_text: Cutting edge wear past 50% = YELLOW. Missing teeth = RED. Pin play exceeding spec = YELLOW.

attachments.spec_text: Quick coupler pins fully engaged. Attachment mounting secure. Hydraulic lines to attachment leak-free.

engine.spec_text: Oil level between MIN/MAX on dipstick. Belt tension correct. No external oil leaks. Filter service per schedule.

cab.spec_text: All gauges functional. Seat belt operational. Horn audible. Mirrors intact and adjusted. Windshield clear.

drivetrain.spec_text: Final drive oil level correct. No external leaks. Travel motor response normal both directions.

tracks_left.spec_text: Track tension sag: 30-40mm at measurement point. Master link cotter pins must be present. Sprocket teeth: replace at 50% wear.

tracks_right.spec_text: Track tension sag: 30-40mm at measurement point. Master link cotter pins must be present. Sprocket teeth: replace at 50% wear.
